caption: A man with white hair and a beard, wearing glasses and a cream-colored sleeveless jacket over a light-colored long-sleeved shirt, stands behind a podium giving a speech. He is positioned in front of a textured, dark green wall featuring a repeating geometric, cross-like relief pattern. Two microphones are positioned in front of him on the podium. To his right, a vertical decorative pillar with gold accents and small red flowers is visible. Across the sequence, the man speaks, shifting his gaze and gesturing with his hands. In the beginning, he looks straight ahead; he then glances slightly to his right while bringing his hands together. He then looks back toward the center before shifting his gaze again and gesturing with his right hand as he continues to speak. The background and setting remain static throughout the clip.
